from __future__ import annotations


def _validate_token(raw: str) -> str:
    if not raw:
        raise ValueError("raw is required")
    return raw


def function_body_contains_setup_validation_execution_and_formatting_all_at_once_negative(raw: str) -> str:
    token = _validate_token(raw).strip().upper()
    return f"[ID-{token}]"
